headline: A cleaner system architecture for public funnel, operator control, and deployment
intro: myappai brings the public site, custom GPT workflow, command router, content engine, payment routing, and deploy visibility into one coherent product surface.

items.title: Premium public funnel
items.description: A faster, cleaner, higher-dollar public experience with clearer buyer routing and less page clutter.
items.outcome: Better first impression and stronger commercial intent.

items.title: Custom GPT operator
items.description: Natural-language operator mode now targets the real frontend and content layers instead of dead legacy folders.
items.outcome: Safer and more useful admin automation.

items.title: Payment routing
items.description: Stripe and PayPal readiness are surfaced at the offer level, with PayPal able to route through the configured email fallback.

items.title: Deploy visibility
items.description: Release activity stays tied to the admin workflow and git-based deploy path.
items.outcome: The operational story is part of the product.
